response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals, solid craftsmanship, and some distributed systems experience, they critically lack the required 8 years of C++ programming (has ~6 months from 2014-2015, a decade ago) and show no demonstrated technical leadership role. For a mid-senior technical lead position on a cloud compute platform, these gaps are too significant to overcome despite otherwise solid general engineering credentials.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship with deep TDD and testing expertise across multiple product launches and environments
Broad technical foundation across full-stack development, web, mobile, and embedded systems demonstrating architectural capability
Proven mentoring and knowledge-sharing through workshops, courses, and open-source platform development (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: Critical gap: Only ~6 months of C++ experience from 2014-2015; minimum requirement is 8 years of active C++ programming
No explicit technical leadership experience—no evidence of leading teams, mentoring engineers, or owning architectural decisions at scale
Limited cloud infrastructure depth; AWS CDK and Kubernetes exposure present but no core platform architecture or compute infrastructure experience
